message:
test(dashboard): add server integration test with adapter

Adds TestServer_FleetPage_WithAdapter to verify the full data flow:
MockRealDaemon -> DaemonAdapter -> Server -> HTML output

This proves that when real task data is provided through the adapter
layer, it correctly appears in the rendered page.
